title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: PiD Pixel Diffusion by Nvidia is a free and open source AI image model optimized for generating high resolution 4K images. The video demonstrates PiD workflows in ComfyUI, comparisons with competing models like SeedVR2, and integration with other components like Z-image turbo and Gemma text encoders.
